title: Inventory locust and environmental data sources for East Africa
outcome: A dated source inventory separating vegetation indices, soil moisture, wind fields, field reports, and unusable sources.
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Define breeding habitat suitability baseline for East Africa
outcome: A reproducible baseline specification for desert locust breeding habitat suitability using vegetation, soil moisture, and rainfall data.
expected_artifact: validation.md update with baseline specification and data checks.
validation_method: Replicator reruns the baseline on a sample region and confirms grain, temporal resolution, and agreement with FAO reported breeding sites.
done_condition: A reviewer can reproduce the baseline calculation and identify false-positive and false-negative breeding habitat classifications against FAO field reports.

title: Correlate environmental signals with outbreak timing and location
outcome: A ranked list of candidate environmental signals with lead-time distributions and false-alarm profiles for swarm formation detection.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and validation.md updates with signal-lead-time matrix.
validation_method: Back-test candidate signals against historical FAO swarm reports and report false-positive and false-negative rates at each lead time.
done_condition: No outbreak signal is accepted without lead-time distribution, false-alarm profile, and replication status.

title: Hindcast swarm movement trajectories using wind field data
outcome: A hindcast validation of swarm trajectory modeling against FAO reported swarm locations, with error distances and timing errors.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with trajectory error statistics.
validation_method: Replicator reruns trajectory hindcast on independent swarm events and confirms error statistics within reported tolerance.
done_condition: Trajectory hindcast includes mean and maximum error distances, timing errors, and specified validation periods.

title: Red-team harmful operational interpretations of locust early warning
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how outbreak risk maps, swarm forecasts, or habitat alerts could mislead control operations, pesticide decisions, or crop-loss estimates.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every operational claim is either blocked, softened to analytic language, or gated behind domain review and replicated red-team review.

title: Check whether outputs match locust control decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether outbreak risk signals would change any real locust control decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review before publication.
